title: Bug fixes (3) + factor exposure integration into stock analysis

bugs_found: backtest.py: overlapping 3M return compounding — monthly eval with 3M forward returns produces overlapping observations, compounded as prod() inflating total returns by 3x
factor_model.py: shared _FACTOR_CACHE_TS timestamp for both ff5_daily and mom_daily cache keys — loading momentum resets ff5 validity, causing stale data to be served
tail_risk.py: dead code — 'downside = returns[returns < threshold]' computed but never used
observation.gap_identified: Factor model exposures exist as separate API endpoint but are NOT included in the stock analysis response — requires a second API call to show factor decomposition on stock pages

bugs_fixed: backtest.py: use non-overlapping quarterly sampling (every 3rd observation) for total return compounding and Sharpe ratio, preserving all monthly observations for hit-rate statistics
factor_model.py: changed _FACTOR_CACHE_TS from a single float to a per-key dict so ff5 and momentum cache entries have independent expiry timestamps
implementation.feature_built: Integrated Fama-French factor exposure into stock analysis response — reuses already-fetched price data to avoid redundant yfinance calls. Returns compact summary: alpha, factor loadings, style classification, R-squared, residual vol. Stock page can now show factor decomposition without a second API call.

limitations: Backtest fix uses simple every-3rd-row sampling; a more sophisticated approach would use date-aligned quarterly windows
Factor exposure adds latency to stock analysis from Kenneth French data download (cached for 24h)
Factor exposure returns None for stocks with <126 days of overlapping data with factor data
assessment.self_critique: Could have also integrated factor exposure into the screener/signal_engine as a quality signal (high-alpha stocks get a boost). That would be a natural next step.

next_steps: Integrate factor alpha as a signal component in stock signals (quality alpha -> bullish tilt)
Add factor exposure display on frontend stock analysis page
Wire copula tail dependence into portfolio analysis response
Add liquidity-adjusted position sizing in portfolio optimizer
